items.caption: A large, industrial oven with its doors open, emitting a significant amount of fire and smoke. the interior of the oven is visible, with flames consuming what appears to be a substance inside. the oven is mounted on a wheeled cart, and there is a fan to the left side of the oven, which could be part of the fire suppression system. the background is blurred, but it seems to be an industrial setting with machinery and equipment.
